violations.text: Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as milk) in the dairy cooler. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the fan covers in the walk-in cooler has an accumulation of dust. New Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2025
The ceiling tiles in the main retail area is in poor repair (water damage). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as beverages) in a refrigeration unit. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/07/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back storage areas. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/07/2023

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the back storage area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023
The hand-washing sink in the back storage area was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023

Various food product was observed held at (46-52) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023

Walk in cooler located in the retail area was not in good repair(inadequate ambient temperatures).Establishment not allowed to store any TCS foods in unit until serviced/repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelves in back storage area have an accumulation of dust and a small accumulation old rodent droppings. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2023
The ceilings and fans in walk in cooler has an accumulation of dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back storage and outside back area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2023

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in the walk in cooler. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2023
